'''ngajuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabluna|kabluna]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-j-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabluna|kabluna]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngajuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæjijith|ngæjijith]] || [[word:ngæjijij|ngæjijij]] || [[word:ngæjijish|ngæjijish]] || [[word:ngæjiji|ngæjiji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngajujujuth|ngajujujuth]] || [[word:ngajujujuj|ngajujujuj]] || [[word:ngajujujush|ngajujujush]] || [[word:ngajujuju|ngajujuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngajujuth|ngajujuth]] || [[word:ngajujuj|ngajujuj]] || [[word:ngajujush|ngajujush]] || [[word:ngajuju|ngajuju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngajufjuth|ngajufjuth]] || [[word:ngajufjuj|ngajufjuj]] || [[word:ngajufjush|ngajufjush]] || [[word:ngajufjuf|ngajufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngajujuthu|ngajujuthu]] || [[word:ngajujuju|ngajujuju]] || [[word:ngajujushu|ngajujushu]] || [[word:ngajujuku|ngajujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngajujuth|ngajujuth]] || [[word:ngajujuj|ngajujuj]] || [[word:ngajujush|ngajujush]] || [[word:ngajuju|ngajuju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngajujuthul|ngajujuthul]] || [[word:ngajujujul|ngajujujul]] || [[word:ngajujushul|ngajujushul]] || [[word:ngajujukul|ngajujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngajujuthuthu|ngajujuthuthu]] || [[word:ngajujujuju|ngajujujuju]] || [[word:ngajujushushu|ngajujushushu]] || [[word:ngajujuku|ngajujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngajujuthun|ngajujuthun]] || [[word:ngajujujun|ngajujujun]] || [[word:ngajujushun|ngajujushun]] || [[word:ngajujukun|ngajujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngajujuthuoro|ngajujuthuoro]] || [[word:ngajujujuoro|ngajujujuoro]] || [[word:ngajujushuoro|ngajujushuoro]] || [[word:ngajujukuoro|ngajujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
